```{r, eval=FALSE}
dat_avg   <- sex_age_avg_mod$fitted_model$data
identical(rownames(dat_class), rownames(dat_avg)) # should be TRUE
id_class <- with(dat_class, paste(rings_comb, season, date_J, sep = "_"))
id_avg   <- with(dat_avg,   paste(rings_comb, season, date_J, sep = "_"))
identical(id_class, id_avg) # should be TRUE

set.seed(123)
fold_id <- sample(rep(1:10, length.out = nrow(sex_age_class_mod$data)))

kfc_age_class <- kfold(
  sex_age_class_mod$fitted_model,
  K = 10,
  folds = fold_id
)

saveRDS(kfc_age_class,
        file = here("out/Jan_2026/kfc_age_class.rds"))

# IMPORTANT: make sure the rows are in the same order as fold_id
# If dat_age_mod is the same data just with different columns, this is fine.
kfc_age_avg <- kfold(
  sex_age_avg_mod$fitted_model,
  K = 10,
  folds = fold_id
)
saveRDS(kfc_age_avg,
        file = here("out/Jan_2026/kfc_age_avg.rds"))
```


```{r}
kfc_age_avg <- readRDS(
  here("out/Jan_2026/kfc_age_avg.rds")
)

kfc_age_class <- readRDS(
  here("out/Jan_2026/kfc_age_class.rds")
)

loo_compare(kfc_age_class, kfc_age_avg)
```

#### sex-specific model 
```{r}
# ================================
# 2. Extract posterior draws
# ================================
post <- as_draws_df(sex_mod$fitted_model)

# ----------------
# Standardized sex effect on baseline
resid_sd <- sd(sex_mod$data$score, na.rm = TRUE)
sex_baseline_std <- post$b_baseline_sexM / resid_sd
sex_t0_std <- post$b_t0_sexM / resid_sd

# ================================
# 3. Back-transform t0 and baseline
# ================================
date_scaling <- sex_mod$data %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_J = mean(date_J),
    sd_J   = sd(date_J),
    n      = dplyr::n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Weighted mean SD across seasons (recommended)
mean_date_sd   <- with(date_scaling, weighted.mean(sd_J, w = n))
mean_date_mean <- with(date_scaling, weighted.mean(mean_J, w = n))

post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    # sex-specific baseline
    baseline_sexF_int = b_baseline_Intercept,
    baseline_sexM_b = b_baseline_sexM,
    t0_sexF_int = (b_t0_Intercept) * mean_date_sd + mean_date_mean,
    t0_sexM_b = (b_t0_sexM * mean_date_sd)
  )

# ================================
# 4. Posterior summary helper
# ================================
summarize_posterior <- function(x) {
  c(
    median   = median(x),
    ci_lower = quantile(x, 0.025),
    ci_upper = quantile(x, 0.975)
  )
}

# ----------------
# Summarize key fixed effects
std_sex_baseline_summary <- summarize_posterior(sex_baseline_std)
std_sex_t0_summary <- summarize_posterior(sex_t0_std)
t0_sexF_int_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexF_int)
t0_sexM_b_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexM_b)
baseline_sexF_int_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$baseline_sexF_int)
baseline_sexM_b_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$baseline_sexM_b)

# back-transformed t0 predictions (real dates)
t0_sexF_int_summary_trans <- 
  as.Date(t0_sexF_int_summary - 181 - 1, origin = paste0("2021", "-01-01")) %>% 
  format(., "%b-%d")

# ================================
# 5. Interpret k: peak rate of change in days·score⁻¹
# ================================
post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    # Peak rate in days·score⁻¹
    rate_days_score_sexF = 1 / (((baseline_sexF_int - 1) * b_k_Intercept) / (4 * mean_date_sd)),
    rate_days_score_sexM = 1 / (((baseline_sexF_int + baseline_sexM_b - 1) * b_k_Intercept) / (4 * mean_date_sd))
  ) %>%
  mutate(rate_days_score_diff_MminusF = rate_days_score_sexM - rate_days_score_sexF)

rate_sexF_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$rate_days_score_sexF)
rate_diff_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$rate_days_score_diff_MminusF)

# ================================
# 6. Bayesian R²
# ================================
r2_df <- r2_bayes(sex_mod$fitted_model) %>% as.data.frame()

r2_summary <- tibble(
  type     = c("Marginal R²", "Conditional R²"),
  mean     = c(r2_df$R2[2], r2_df$R2[1]),
  ci_lower = c(r2_df$CI_low[2], r2_df$CI_low[1]),
  ci_upper = c(r2_df$CI_high[2], r2_df$CI_high[1])
)

# ================================
# 7. Variance components & repeatabilities
# ================================
post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    var_baseline_indiv =
      sd_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept^2 +
      `sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2,
    var_t0_indiv =
      sd_rings_comb__t0_Intercept^2 +
      `sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2,
    R_baseline = var_baseline_indiv / (var_baseline_indiv + sigma^2),
    R_t0       = var_t0_indiv / (var_t0_indiv + sigma^2),
    R_baseline_within_season =
      `sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2 /
      (`sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2 + sigma^2),
    R_t0_within_season =
      `sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2 /
      (`sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2 + sigma^2)
  )

R_baseline_summary               <- summarize_posterior(post$R_baseline)
R_t0_summary                     <- summarize_posterior(post$R_t0)
R_baseline_within_season_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$R_baseline_within_season)
R_t0_within_season_summary       <- summarize_posterior(post$R_t0_within_season)

# ================================
# 8. Variance component table
# ================================
var_baseline_rings_comb <- summarize_posterior(
  post$sd_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept^2
)

var_t0_rings_comb <- summarize_posterior(
  post$sd_rings_comb__t0_Intercept^2
)

resid_var <- summarize_posterior(post$sigma^2)

# ================================
# 11. Posterior correlation between baseline and t0
# ================================
cor_baseline_t0_summary_ <- summarize_posterior(post$cor_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept__t0_Intercept)

### summary table 
# Sex effects are parameterized using treatment coding, with females as the reference category. Sex coefficients therefore represent the posterior difference between males and females (male − female).
sex_mod_summary_table <- tibble(
  parameter = c(
    "Baseline alternate plumage score (β), females (reference)",
    "Sex effect on baseline alternate plumage score (β): males − females",
    "Pre-basic moult midpoint (t0), females (reference)",
    "Sex effect on pre-basic moult midpoint (t0): males − females",
    "Pre-basic moult rate at inflection (days·score⁻¹), females (reference)",
    "Sex effect on pre-basic moult rate at inflection (days·score⁻¹): males − females",
    "Between-year repeatability of alternate plumage",
    "Within-year repeatability of alternate plumage",
    "Between-year repeatability of pre-basic moult mid-point date",
    "Within-year repeatability of pre-basic moult mid-point date",
    "Marginal R²",
    "Conditional R²",
    "Between-individual variance in baseline plumage score",
    "Between-individual variance in pre-basic moult midpoint date",
    "Correlation between baseline alternate plumage score and pre-basic moult midpoint date",
    "Residual variance"
  ),
  type = c(
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Repeatability",
    "Repeatability",
    "Repeatability",
    "Repeatability",
    "Model-level goodness-of-fit",
    "Model-level goodness-of-fit",
    "Between-individual variance (random effects)",
    "Between-individual variance (random effects)",
    "Random-effects correlation",
    "Residual (within-observation) variance"
  ),
  parameter_ = c(
    "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    "Moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    "Moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    ""
  ),
  mean = c(
    baseline_sexF_int_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_sexM_b_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["median"],
    t0_sexM_b_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    rate_sexF_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    rate_diff_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    R_baseline_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    R_t0_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    R_baseline_within_season_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    R_t0_within_season_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    r2_summary$mean[1] %>% round(2),
    r2_summary$mean[2] %>% round(2),
    var_baseline_rings_comb["median"] %>% round(2),
    var_t0_rings_comb["median"] %>% round(2),
    cor_baseline_t0_summary_["median"] %>% round(2),
    resid_var["median"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  ci_lower = c(
    baseline_sexF_int_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_sexM_b_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["ci_lower.2.5%"],
    t0_sexM_b_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    rate_sexF_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    rate_diff_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    R_baseline_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    R_t0_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    R_baseline_within_season_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    R_t0_within_season_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    r2_summary$ci_lower[1] %>% round(2),
    r2_summary$ci_lower[2] %>% round(2),
    var_baseline_rings_comb["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    var_t0_rings_comb["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    cor_baseline_t0_summary_["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    resid_var["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  ci_upper = c(
    baseline_sexF_int_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["ci_upper.97.5%"],
    t0_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    rate_sexF_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    rate_diff_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    R_baseline_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    R_t0_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    R_baseline_within_season_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    R_t0_within_season_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    r2_summary$ci_upper[1] %>% round(2),
    r2_summary$ci_upper[2] %>% round(2),
    var_baseline_rings_comb["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    var_t0_rings_comb["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    cor_baseline_t0_summary_["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    resid_var["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  row = c(1:16)
) %>%
  mutate(median_CI = paste0(mean, " [", ci_lower, ", ", ci_upper, "]")) %>% 
  select(-c(mean, ci_lower, ci_upper))

sex_mod_summary_table %>% select(-c(type, parameter_))
# ================================
# 9. Posterior distributions of fixed effects
# ================================
posterior_fixed <- sex_mod$fitted_model %>%
  spread_draws(
    b_baseline_Intercept,
    b_baseline_sexM,
    b_t0_Intercept,
    b_t0_sexM,
    b_k_Intercept
  )

posterior_long <- posterior_fixed %>%
  select(-c(.chain, .iteration, .draw)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "term", values_to = "estimate")

ggplot(posterior_long, aes(x = estimate, y = term)) +
  stat_halfeye(.width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),
               fill = "skyblue",
               color = "darkblue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior distributions of fixed effects",
    x = "Estimate",
    y = "Parameter"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# # ================================
# # 10. Access key derived quantities
# # ================================
# post$baseline_sexF
# post$baseline_sexM
# post$t0
# post$rate_days_score_sexF
# post$rate_days_score_sexM

# ================================
# 12. Posterior predictive checks
# ================================
# Plot observed vs simulated data
pp_check(sex_mod$fitted_model, ndraws = 100)

# ================================
# 13. R-hat checks for convergence
# ================================
rhat_values <- posterior::rhat(sex_mod$fitted_model)
summary(rhat_values)  # All should be ~1 for good convergence
```

#### sex-specific phenology model: first breeding, last breeding, and last nest lay date
```{r}
# ================================
# 2. Extract posterior draws
# ================================
post <- as_draws_df(sex_all_3_breed_mod$fitted_model)

# ----------------
# Standardized sex effect on baseline
resid_sd <- sd(sex_all_3_breed_mod$data$score, na.rm = TRUE)
sex_baseline_std <- post$b_baseline_sexM / resid_sd
sex_t0_std <- post$b_t0_sexM / resid_sd

breed_date_scaling <- sex_all_3_breed_mod$data %>%
  distinct(rings_comb, sex, season, 
           last_breeding_date_J_snum, 
           first_breeding_date_J_snum, 
           last_nest_first_obs_J_snum) %>% 
  group_by(season) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_first_breed = mean(first_breeding_date_J_snum),
      mean_last_breed = mean(last_breeding_date_J_snum),
      mean_last_lay = mean(last_nest_first_obs_J_snum),
      sd_first_breed = sd(first_breeding_date_J_snum),
      sd_last_breed = sd(last_breeding_date_J_snum),
      sd_last_lay = sd(last_nest_first_obs_J_snum),
      n      = dplyr::n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

# Weighted mean SD across seasons (recommended)
mean_sd_first_breed   <- with(breed_date_scaling, weighted.mean(sd_first_breed, w = n))
mean_sd_last_breed   <- with(breed_date_scaling, weighted.mean(sd_last_breed, w = n))
mean_sd_last_lay   <- with(breed_date_scaling, weighted.mean(sd_last_lay, w = n))
mean_mean_first_breed   <- with(breed_date_scaling, weighted.mean(mean_first_breed, w = n))
mean_mean_last_breed   <- with(breed_date_scaling, weighted.mean(mean_last_breed, w = n))
mean_mean_last_lay   <- with(breed_date_scaling, weighted.mean(mean_last_lay, w = n))

# ----------------
# Back-transform last_nest_first_obs_J_snum effect to "per 10 days"
# Multiply by mean_date_sd to go from standardized units to days
# Then multiply by 10 to express per 10 days

# last_nest_baseline_SDd <- post$b_baseline_last_nest_first_obs_J_snum * mean_date_sd * lay_sd
first_breed_t0_SDd       <- post$b_t0_first_breeding_date_J_snum * mean_sd_first_breed
last_breed_t0_SDd       <- post$b_t0_last_breeding_date_J_snum * mean_sd_last_breed
last_lay_t0_SDd       <- post$b_t0_last_nest_first_obs_J_snum * mean_sd_last_lay

# Posterior summaries
# last_nest_baseline_SDd_summary <- summarize_posterior(last_nest_baseline_SDd)
first_breed_t0_SDd_summary       <- summarize_posterior(first_breed_t0_SDd)
last_breed_t0_SDd_summary       <- summarize_posterior(last_breed_t0_SDd)
last_lay_t0_SDd_summary       <- summarize_posterior(last_lay_t0_SDd)

# ================================
# 3. Back-transform t0 and baseline
# ================================
date_scaling <- sex_all_3_breed_mod$data %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_J = mean(date_J),
      sd_J   = sd(date_J),
      n      = dplyr::n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

# Weighted mean SD across seasons (recommended)
mean_date_sd   <- with(date_scaling, weighted.mean(sd_J, w = n))
mean_date_mean <- with(date_scaling, weighted.mean(mean_J, w = n))

post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    # sex-specific baseline
    baseline_sexF_int = b_baseline_Intercept,
    baseline_sexM_b = b_baseline_sexM,
    t0_sexF_int = (b_t0_Intercept) * mean_date_sd + mean_date_mean,
    t0_sexM_b = (b_t0_sexM * mean_date_sd)
  )

# ================================
# 4. Posterior summary helper
# ================================
summarize_posterior <- function(x) {
  c(
    median   = median(x),
    ci_lower = quantile(x, 0.025),
    ci_upper = quantile(x, 0.975)
  )
}

# ----------------
# Summarize key fixed effects
std_sex_baseline_summary <- summarize_posterior(sex_baseline_std)
std_sex_t0_summary <- summarize_posterior(sex_t0_std)
t0_sexF_int_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexF_int)
t0_sexM_b_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexM_b)
baseline_sexF_int_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$baseline_sexF_int)
baseline_sexM_b_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$baseline_sexM_b)

# back-transformed t0 predictions (real dates)
t0_sexF_int_summary_trans <- 
  as.Date(t0_sexF_int_summary - 181 - 1, origin = paste0("2021", "-01-01")) %>% 
  format(., "%b-%d")

# ================================
# 5. Interpret k: peak rate of change in days·score⁻¹
# ================================
post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    # Peak rate in days·score⁻¹
    rate_days_score_sexF = 1 / ((baseline_sexF_int - 1) * b_k_Intercept) / (4 * mean_date_sd),
    rate_days_score_sexM = 1 / ((baseline_sexF_int + baseline_sexM_b - 1) * b_k_Intercept) / (4 * mean_date_sd)
  ) %>%
  mutate(rate_days_score_diff_MminusF = rate_days_score_sexM - rate_days_score_sexF)

rate_sexF_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$rate_days_score_sexF)
rate_diff_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$rate_days_score_diff_MminusF)

# ================================
# 6. Bayesian R²
# ================================
r2_df <- r2_bayes(sex_all_3_breed_mod$fitted_model) %>% as.data.frame()

r2_summary <- tibble(
  type     = c("Marginal R²", "Conditional R²"),
  mean     = c(r2_df$R2[2], r2_df$R2[1]),
  ci_lower = c(r2_df$CI_low[2], r2_df$CI_low[1]),
  ci_upper = c(r2_df$CI_high[2], r2_df$CI_high[1])
)

# ================================
# 7. Variance components & repeatabilities
# ================================
post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    var_baseline_indiv =
      sd_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept^2 +
      `sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2,
    var_t0_indiv =
      sd_rings_comb__t0_Intercept^2 +
      `sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2,
    R_baseline = var_baseline_indiv / (var_baseline_indiv + sigma^2),
    R_t0       = var_t0_indiv / (var_t0_indiv + sigma^2),
    R_baseline_within_season =
      `sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2 /
      (`sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2 + sigma^2),
    R_t0_within_season =
      `sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2 /
      (`sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2 + sigma^2)
  )

R_baseline_summary               <- summarize_posterior(post$R_baseline)
R_t0_summary                     <- summarize_posterior(post$R_t0)
R_baseline_within_season_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$R_baseline_within_season)
R_t0_within_season_summary       <- summarize_posterior(post$R_t0_within_season)

# ================================
# 8. Variance component table
# ================================
var_baseline_rings_comb <- summarize_posterior(
  post$sd_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept^2
)

var_t0_rings_comb <- summarize_posterior(
  post$sd_rings_comb__t0_Intercept^2
)

resid_var <- summarize_posterior(post$sigma^2)

# ================================
# 11. Posterior correlation between baseline and t0
# ================================
cor_baseline_t0_summary_ <- summarize_posterior(post$cor_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept__t0_Intercept)

### summary table 
sex_all_3_summary_table <- tibble(
  parameter = c(
    # "Female median alternate plumage (beta)",
    # "Male median alternate plumage (beta)",
    # "Female pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    # "Male pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    "Δ pre-basic moult midpoint (t0; days) per +1 SD (within-season) delay in first breeding date",
    "Δ pre-basic moult midpoint (t0; days) per +1 SD (within-season) delay in last breeding date",
    "Δ pre-basic moult midpoint (t0; days) per +1 SD (within-season) delay in last nest date"
    # "Female moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "Male moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "Between year alternate plumage",
    # "Within year alternate plumage",
    # "Between year moult mid-point date",
    # "Within year moult mid-point date",
    # "Marginal R²",
    # "Conditional R²",
    # "Random effect variance (baseline)",
    # "Random effect variance (t0)",
    # "Correlation between beta and t0",
    # "Residual variance"
  ),
  type = c(
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)"
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Model-level goodness-of-fit",
    # "Model-level goodness-of-fit",
    # "Between-individual variance (random effects)",
    # "Between-individual variance (random effects)",
    # "Random-effects correlation",
    # "Residual (within-observation) variance"
  ),
  parameter_ = c(
    # "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    # "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    # "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    # "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    "Breeding phenology",
    "Breeding phenology",
    "Breeding phenology"
    # "Moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "Moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # ""
  ),
  mean = c(
    # baseline_sexF_int_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # baseline_sexM_b_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["median"],
    # t0_sexM_b_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    first_breed_t0_SDd_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    last_breed_t0_SDd_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    last_lay_t0_SDd_summary["median"] %>% round(2)
    # rate_sexF_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # rate_diff_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_within_season_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_within_season_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$mean[1] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$mean[2] %>% round(2),
    # var_baseline_rings_comb["median"] %>% round(2),
    # var_t0_rings_comb["median"] %>% round(2),
    # cor_baseline_t0_summary_["median"] %>% round(2),
    # resid_var["median"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  ci_lower = c(
    # baseline_sexF_int_summary["ci_upper.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # baseline_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["ci_upper.2.5%"],
    # t0_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    first_breed_t0_SDd_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    last_breed_t0_SDd_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    last_lay_t0_SDd_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2)
    # rate_sexF_summary["ci_upper.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # rate_diff_summary["ci_upper.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_within_season_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_within_season_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_lower[1] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_lower[2] %>% round(2),
    # var_baseline_rings_comb["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # var_t0_rings_comb["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # cor_baseline_t0_summary_["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # resid_var["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  ci_upper = c(
    # baseline_sexF_int_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # baseline_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["ci_upper.97.5%"],
    # t0_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    first_breed_t0_SDd_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    last_breed_t0_SDd_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    last_lay_t0_SDd_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2)
    # rate_sexF_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # rate_diff_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_within_season_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_within_season_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_upper[1] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_upper[2] %>% round(2),
    # var_baseline_rings_comb["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # var_t0_rings_comb["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # cor_baseline_t0_summary_["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # resid_var["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  row = c(5:7)
) %>%
  mutate(median_CI = paste0(mean, " [", ci_lower, ", ", ci_upper, "]"))

sex_all_3_summary_table %>% select(-c(mean, ci_lower, ci_upper))

# ================================
# 9. Posterior distributions of fixed effects
# ================================
posterior_fixed <- sex_all_3_breed_mod$fitted_model %>%
  spread_draws(
    b_baseline_Intercept,
    b_baseline_sexM,
    b_t0_Intercept,
    b_t0_sexM,
    b_t0_first_breeding_date_J_snum,
    b_t0_last_nest_first_obs_J_snum,
    b_t0_last_breeding_date_J_snum,
    b_k_Intercept
  )

posterior_long <- posterior_fixed %>%
  select(-c(.chain, .iteration, .draw)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "term", values_to = "estimate")

ggplot(posterior_long, aes(x = estimate, y = term)) +
  stat_halfeye(.width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),
               fill = "skyblue",
               color = "darkblue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior distributions of fixed effects",
    x = "Estimate",
    y = "Parameter"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# # ================================
# # 10. Access key derived quantities
# # ================================
# post$baseline_sexF
# post$baseline_sexM
# post$t0
# post$rate_days_score_sexF
# post$rate_days_score_sexM

# ================================
# 12. Posterior predictive checks
# ================================
# Plot observed vs simulated data
pp_check(sex_all_3_breed_mod$fitted_model, ndraws = 100)

# ================================
# 13. R-hat checks for convergence
# ================================
rhat_values <- posterior::rhat(sex_all_3_breed_mod$fitted_model)
summary(rhat_values)  # All should be ~1 for good convergence
```

#### sex- and age-class model
```{r}
# ================================
# 2. Extract posterior draws
# ================================
post <- as_draws_df(sex_age_class_mod$fitted_model)

# ----------------
# Standardized sex effect on baseline
resid_sd <- sd(sex_age_class_mod$data$score, na.rm = TRUE)
sex_baseline_std <- post$b_baseline_sexM / resid_sd
sex_t0_std <- post$b_t0_sexM / resid_sd
age_class_baseline_std <- post$b_baseline_age_classAFY / resid_sd
age_class_t0_std <- post$b_t0_age_classAFY / resid_sd

# ================================
# 3. Back-transform t0 and baseline
# ================================
date_scaling <- sex_age_class_mod$data %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_J = mean(date_J),
      sd_J   = sd(date_J),
      n      = dplyr::n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

# Weighted mean SD across seasons (recommended)
mean_date_sd   <- with(date_scaling, weighted.mean(sd_J, w = n))
mean_date_mean <- with(date_scaling, weighted.mean(mean_J, w = n))

post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    # sex-specific baseline
    baseline_sexF = b_baseline_Intercept,
    baseline_sexM = b_baseline_Intercept + b_baseline_sexM,
    
    # effect of age class on baseline
    baseline_age_classAFY = b_baseline_age_classAFY,
    
    # sex-specific t0
    t0_sexF_date = (b_t0_Intercept) * mean_date_sd + mean_date_mean,
    t0_sexM_date = (b_t0_Intercept + b_t0_sexM) * mean_date_sd + mean_date_mean,

    # effect of age class on t0
    t0_age_classAFY_days = b_t0_age_classAFY * mean_date_sd
  )

# ================================
# 4. Posterior summary helper
# ================================
summarize_posterior <- function(x) {
  c(
    median   = median(x),
    ci_lower = quantile(x, 0.025),
    ci_upper = quantile(x, 0.975)
  )
}

# ----------------
# Summarize key fixed effects
std_sex_baseline_summary <- summarize_posterior(sex_baseline_std)
std_sex_t0_summary <- summarize_posterior(sex_t0_std)
std_age_class_baseline_summary <- summarize_posterior(age_class_baseline_std)
std_age_class_t0_summary <- summarize_posterior(age_class_t0_std)
t0_sexF_int_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexF_int)
t0_sexM_b_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexM_b)

# sex-specific baselines
baseline_sexF_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$baseline_sexF)
baseline_sexM_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$baseline_sexM)

# sex-specific t0s
t0_sexF_date_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexF_date)
t0_sexM_date_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexM_date)

# age-class effects
baseline_age_classAFY_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$baseline_age_classAFY)
t0_age_classAFY_days_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_age_classAFY_days)

# # back-transformed t0 predictions (real dates)
# t0_sexF_summary_trans <- 
#   as.Date(t0_sexF_summary - 181 - 1, origin = paste0("2021", "-01-01")) %>% 
#   format(., "%b-%d")
# 
# t0_sexM_summary_trans <- 
#   as.Date(t0_sexM_summary - 181 - 1, origin = paste0("2021", "-01-01")) %>% 
#   format(., "%b-%d")

# ================================
# 5. Interpret k: peak rate of change in days·score⁻¹
# ================================
post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    # Peak rate in scores·day⁻¹
    rate_scores_day_sexF = ((baseline_sexF - 1) * b_k_Intercept) / (4 * mean_date_sd),
    rate_scores_day_sexM = ((baseline_sexM - 1) * b_k_Intercept) / (4 * mean_date_sd),
    # Convert to days·score⁻¹
    rate_days_score_sexF = 1 / rate_scores_day_sexF,
    rate_days_score_sexM = 1 / rate_scores_day_sexM
  )

rate_sexF_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$rate_days_score_sexF)
rate_sexM_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$rate_days_score_sexM)

# ================================
# 6. Bayesian R²
# ================================
r2_df <- r2_bayes(sex_age_class_mod$fitted_model) %>% as.data.frame()

r2_summary <- tibble(
  type     = c("Marginal R²", "Conditional R²"),
  mean     = c(r2_df$R2[2], r2_df$R2[1]),
  ci_lower = c(r2_df$CI_low[2], r2_df$CI_low[1]),
  ci_upper = c(r2_df$CI_high[2], r2_df$CI_high[1])
)

# ================================
# 7. Variance components & repeatabilities
# ================================
post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    var_baseline_indiv =
      sd_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept^2 +
      `sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2,
    var_t0_indiv =
      sd_rings_comb__t0_Intercept^2 +
      `sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2,
    R_baseline = var_baseline_indiv / (var_baseline_indiv + sigma^2),
    R_t0       = var_t0_indiv / (var_t0_indiv + sigma^2),
    R_baseline_within_season =
      `sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2 /
      (`sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2 + sigma^2),
    R_t0_within_season =
      `sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2 /
      (`sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2 + sigma^2)
  )

R_baseline_summary               <- summarize_posterior(post$R_baseline)
R_t0_summary                     <- summarize_posterior(post$R_t0)
R_baseline_within_season_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$R_baseline_within_season)
R_t0_within_season_summary       <- summarize_posterior(post$R_t0_within_season)

# ================================
# 8. Variance component table
# ================================
var_baseline_rings_comb <- summarize_posterior(
  post$sd_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept^2
)

var_t0_rings_comb <- summarize_posterior(
  post$sd_rings_comb__t0_Intercept^2
)

resid_var <- summarize_posterior(post$sigma^2)

# ================================
# 11. Posterior correlation between baseline and t0
# ================================
cor_baseline_t0_summary_ <- summarize_posterior(post$cor_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept__t0_Intercept)

### summary table 
sex_age_class_mod_summary_table <- tibble(
  parameter = c(
    # "Female median alternate plumage (beta)",
    # "Male median alternate plumage (beta)",
    "Age-class effect on baseline alternate plumage score (β): AFY − FY",
    # "Female pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    # "Male pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    "Age-class effect on pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0): AFY − FY"
    # "Female moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "Male moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "Between year alternate plumage",
    # "Within year alternate plumage",
    # "Between year moult mid-point date",
    # "Within year moult mid-point date",
    # "Marginal R²",
    # "Conditional R²",
    # "Random effect variance (baseline)",
    # "Random effect variance (t0)",
    # "Correlation between beta and t0",
    # "Residual variance"
  ),
  type = c(
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)"
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Model-level goodness-of-fit",
    # "Model-level goodness-of-fit",
    # "Between-individual variance (random effects)",
    # "Between-individual variance (random effects)",
    # "Random-effects correlation",
    # "Residual (within-observation) variance"
  ),
  parameter_ = c(
    # "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    # "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    # "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    # "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)"
    # "Moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "Moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # ""
  ),
  mean = c(
    # baseline_sexF_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # baseline_sexM_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_age_classAFY_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["median"],
    # t0_sexM_b_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    t0_age_classAFY_days_summary["median"] %>% round(2)
    # rate_sexF_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # rate_sexM_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_within_season_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_within_season_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$mean[1] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$mean[2] %>% round(2),
    # var_baseline_rings_comb["median"] %>% round(2),
    # var_t0_rings_comb["median"] %>% round(2),
    # cor_baseline_t0_summary_["median"] %>% round(2),
    # resid_var["median"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  ci_lower = c(
    # baseline_sexF_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # baseline_sexM_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_age_classAFY_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["ci_upper.2.5%"],
    # t0_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    t0_age_classAFY_days_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2)
    # rate_sexF_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # rate_sexM_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_within_season_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_within_season_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_lower[1] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_lower[2] %>% round(2),
    # var_baseline_rings_comb["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # var_t0_rings_comb["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # cor_baseline_t0_summary_["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # resid_var["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  ci_upper = c(
    # baseline_sexF_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # baseline_sexM_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_age_classAFY_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["ci_upper.97.5%"],
    # t0_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    t0_age_classAFY_days_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2)
    # rate_sexF_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # rate_sexM_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_within_season_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_within_season_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_upper[1] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_upper[2] %>% round(2),
    # var_baseline_rings_comb["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # var_t0_rings_comb["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # cor_baseline_t0_summary_["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # resid_var["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  row = c(3,6)
) %>%
  mutate(median_CI = paste0(mean, " [", ci_lower, ", ", ci_upper, "]"))

sex_age_class_mod_summary_table
# ================================
# 9. Posterior distributions of fixed effects
# ================================
posterior_fixed <- sex_age_class_mod$fitted_model %>%
  spread_draws(
    b_baseline_Intercept,
    b_baseline_sexM,
    b_baseline_age_classAFY,
    b_t0_Intercept,
    b_t0_sexM,
    b_t0_age_classAFY,
    b_k_Intercept
  )

posterior_long <- posterior_fixed %>%
  select(-c(.chain, .iteration, .draw)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "term", values_to = "estimate")

ggplot(posterior_long, aes(x = estimate, y = term)) +
  stat_halfeye(.width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),
               fill = "skyblue",
               color = "darkblue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior distributions of fixed effects",
    x = "Estimate",
    y = "Parameter"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# # ================================
# # 10. Access key derived quantities
# # ================================
# post$baseline_sexF
# post$baseline_sexM
# post$t0
# post$rate_days_score_sexF
# post$rate_days_score_sexM

# ================================
# 12. Posterior predictive checks
# ================================
# Plot observed vs simulated data
pp_check(sex_age_class_mod$fitted_model, ndraws = 100)

# ================================
# 13. R-hat checks for convergence
# ================================
rhat_values <- posterior::rhat(sex_age_class_mod$fitted_model)
summary(rhat_values)  # All should be ~1 for good convergence
```

#### sex- and age-specific model
```{r}
# ================================
# 2. Extract posterior draws
# ================================
post <- as_draws_df(sex_age_avg_mod$fitted_model)

# ----------------
# Standardized sex effect on baseline
resid_sd <- sd(sex_age_avg_mod$data$score, na.rm = TRUE)
sex_baseline_std <- post$b_baseline_sexM / resid_sd
sex_t0_std <- post$b_t0_sexM / resid_sd

### Compute sex-specific baseline at age reference points
avg_age_ref <- 3
age_dev_ref <- 0

post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    # baseline at reference ages (population-level fixed effects only)
    baseline_sexF_ref = b_baseline_Intercept +
      b_baseline_avg_age * avg_age_ref +
      b_baseline_age_dev * age_dev_ref,

    baseline_sexM_ref = b_baseline_Intercept + b_baseline_sexM +
      b_baseline_avg_age * avg_age_ref +
      b_baseline_age_dev * age_dev_ref
  )
# sex-specific rates of change given reference ages for between and within levels
post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    rate_ref_sexF = ((baseline_sexF_ref - 1) * b_k_Intercept) / (4 * mean_date_sd),
    rate_ref_sexM = ((baseline_sexM_ref - 1) * b_k_Intercept) / (4 * mean_date_sd)
  )

rateF <- summarize_posterior(post$rate_ref_sexF)
rateM <- summarize_posterior(post$rate_ref_sexM)

# ================================
# 3. Back-transform t0 and baseline
# ================================
date_scaling <- sex_age_avg_mod$data %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_J = mean(date_J),
      sd_J   = sd(date_J),
      n      = dplyr::n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

# Weighted mean SD across seasons (recommended)
mean_date_sd   <- with(date_scaling, weighted.mean(sd_J, w = n))
mean_date_mean <- with(date_scaling, weighted.mean(mean_J, w = n))

post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    # sex-specific baseline
    baseline_sexF = b_baseline_Intercept,
    baseline_sexM = b_baseline_Intercept + b_baseline_sexM,
    t0_sexF_scaled = b_t0_Intercept,
    t0_sexM_scaled = b_t0_Intercept + b_t0_sexM,
    t0_sexF = t0_sexF_scaled * mean_date_sd + mean_date_mean,
    t0_sexM = t0_sexM_scaled * mean_date_sd + mean_date_mean
  )

# ================================
# 4. Posterior summary helper
# ================================
summarize_posterior <- function(x) {
  c(
    median   = median(x),
    ci_lower = quantile(x, 0.025),
    ci_upper = quantile(x, 0.975)
  )
}

# ----------------
# Summarize key fixed effects
std_sex_baseline_summary <- summarize_posterior(sex_baseline_std)
std_sex_t0_summary <- summarize_posterior(sex_t0_std)
t0_sexF_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexF)
t0_sexM_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexM)
baseline_sexF_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$baseline_sexF)
baseline_sexM_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$baseline_sexM)
baseline_between <- summarize_posterior(post$b_baseline_avg_age)
baseline_within  <- summarize_posterior(post$b_baseline_age_dev)
t0_between       <- summarize_posterior(post$b_t0_avg_age)
t0_within        <- summarize_posterior(post$b_t0_age_dev)
t0_sexF_int_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexF_int)
t0_sexM_b_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexM_b)

t0_between_days_per_year_age <- t0_between * mean_date_sd
t0_within_days_per_year_age <- t0_within * mean_date_sd

# # back-transformed t0 predictions (real dates)
# t0_sexF_summary_trans <- 
#   as.Date(t0_sexF_summary - 181 - 1, origin = paste0("2021", "-01-01")) %>% 
#   format(., "%b-%d")
# 
# t0_sexM_summary_trans <- 
#   as.Date(t0_sexM_summary - 181 - 1, origin = paste0("2021", "-01-01")) %>% 
#   format(., "%b-%d")

# back-transformed t0 predictions for refernce ages
ages_ref <- c(1, 3, 8)

newdat_t0 <- expand.grid(
  sex = levels(sex_age_avg_mod$data$sex),
  avg_age = ages_ref,
  age_dev = 0,
  date_J_scaled = 0  # included to satisfy brms; irrelevant for nlpar extraction
)

t0_scaled_draws <- posterior_linpred(
  sex_age_avg_mod$fitted_model,
  newdata = newdat_t0,
  nlpar = "t0",
  re_formula = NA
)

# back-transform: t0_days = t0_scaled * SD + MEAN
t0_days_draws <- t0_scaled_draws * mean_date_sd + mean_date_mean

t0_summary <- as.data.frame(t(apply(t0_days_draws, 2, summarize_posterior))) %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  bind_cols(newdat_t0) %>%
  rename(t0_day = median, t0_l95 = `ci_lower.2.5%`, t0_u95 = `ci_upper.97.5%`) %>%
  select(sex, avg_age, age_dev, t0_day, t0_l95, t0_u95) %>%
  arrange(sex, avg_age) %>% 
  mutate(t0_day = as.Date(t0_day - 181 - 1, origin = paste0("2021", "-01-01")) %>% format(., "%b-%d"),
         t0_l95 = as.Date(t0_l95 - 181 - 1, origin = paste0("2021", "-01-01")) %>% format(., "%b-%d"),
         t0_u95 = as.Date(t0_u95 - 181 - 1, origin = paste0("2021", "-01-01")) %>% format(., "%b-%d"))

t0_summary

# ================================
# 5. Interpret k: peak rate of change in days·score⁻¹
# ================================
date_sd <- mean_date_sd

post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    # Peak rate in scores·day⁻¹
    rate_scores_day_sexF = ((baseline_sexF - 1) * b_k_Intercept) / (4 * date_sd),
    rate_scores_day_sexM = ((baseline_sexM - 1) * b_k_Intercept) / (4 * date_sd),
    # Convert to days·score⁻¹
    rate_days_score_sexF = 1 / rate_scores_day_sexF,
    rate_days_score_sexM = 1 / rate_scores_day_sexM
  )

rate_sexF_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$rate_days_score_sexF)
rate_sexM_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$rate_days_score_sexM)

# ================================
# 6. Bayesian R²
# ================================
r2_df <- r2_bayes(sex_age_avg_mod$fitted_model) %>% as.data.frame()

r2_summary <- tibble(
  type     = c("Marginal R²", "Conditional R²"),
  mean     = c(r2_df$R2[2], r2_df$R2[1]),
  ci_lower = c(r2_df$CI_low[2], r2_df$CI_low[1]),
  ci_upper = c(r2_df$CI_high[2], r2_df$CI_high[1])
)

# ================================
# 7. Variance components & repeatabilities
# ================================
post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    var_baseline_indiv =
      sd_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept^2 +
      `sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2,
    var_t0_indiv =
      sd_rings_comb__t0_Intercept^2 +
      `sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2,
    R_baseline = var_baseline_indiv / (var_baseline_indiv + sigma^2),
    R_t0       = var_t0_indiv / (var_t0_indiv + sigma^2),
    R_baseline_within_season =
      `sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2 /
      (`sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2 + sigma^2),
    R_t0_within_season =
      `sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2 /
      (`sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2 + sigma^2)
  )

R_baseline_summary               <- summarize_posterior(post$R_baseline)
R_t0_summary                     <- summarize_posterior(post$R_t0)
R_baseline_within_season_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$R_baseline_within_season)
R_t0_within_season_summary       <- summarize_posterior(post$R_t0_within_season)

# ================================
# 8. Variance component table
# ================================
var_baseline_rings_comb <- summarize_posterior(
  post$sd_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept^2
)

var_t0_rings_comb <- summarize_posterior(
  post$sd_rings_comb__t0_Intercept^2
)

resid_var <- summarize_posterior(post$sigma^2)

# ================================
# 11. Posterior correlation between baseline and t0
# ================================
cor_baseline_t0_summary_ <- summarize_posterior(post$cor_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept__t0_Intercept)

### summary table 
sex_age_avg_mod_summary_table <- tibble(
  parameter = c(
    # "Female median alternate plumage (beta)",
    # "Male median alternate plumage (beta)",
    "Between-individual age effect on baseline alternate plumage score (β)",
    "Within-individual age effect on baseline alternate plumage score (β)",
    # "Female pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    # "Male pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    "Between-individual age effect on pre-basic moult midpoint (t0)",
    "Within-individual age effect on pre-basic moult midpoint (t0)"
    # "Female moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "Male moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "Between year alternate plumage",
    # "Within year alternate plumage",
    # "Between year moult mid-point date",
    # "Within year moult mid-point date",
    # "Marginal R²",
    # "Conditional R²",
    # "Random effect variance (baseline)",
    # "Random effect variance (t0)",
    # "Correlation between beta and t0",
    # "Residual variance"
  ),
  type = c(
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)"
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Model-level goodness-of-fit",
    # "Model-level goodness-of-fit",
    # "Between-individual variance (random effects)",
    # "Between-individual variance (random effects)",
    # "Random-effects correlation",
    # "Residual (within-observation) variance"
  ),
  parameter_ = c(
    # "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    # "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    # "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    # "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)"
    # "Moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "Moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # ""
  ),
  mean = c(
    # baseline_sexF_int_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # baseline_sexM_b_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_between["median"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_within["median"] %>% round(2),
    # t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["median"],
    # t0_sexM_b_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    t0_between_days_per_year_age["median"] %>% round(2),
    t0_within_days_per_year_age["median"] %>% round(2)
    # rate_sexF_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # rate_sexM_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_within_season_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_within_season_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$mean[1] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$mean[2] %>% round(2),
    # var_baseline_rings_comb["median"] %>% round(2),
    # var_t0_rings_comb["median"] %>% round(2),
    # cor_baseline_t0_summary_["median"] %>% round(2),
    # resid_var["median"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  ci_lower = c(
    # baseline_sexF_int_summary["ci_upper.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # baseline_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_between["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_within["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["ci_upper.2.5%"],
    # t0_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    t0_between_days_per_year_age["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    t0_within_days_per_year_age["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2)
    # rate_sexF_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # rate_sexM_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_within_season_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_within_season_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_lower[1] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_lower[2] %>% round(2),
    # var_baseline_rings_comb["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # var_t0_rings_comb["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # cor_baseline_t0_summary_["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # resid_var["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  ci_upper = c(
    # baseline_sexF_int_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # baseline_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_between["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_within["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["ci_upper.97.5%"],
    # t0_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    t0_between_days_per_year_age["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    t0_within_days_per_year_age["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2)
    # rate_sexF_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # rate_sexM_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_within_season_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_within_season_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_upper[1] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_upper[2] %>% round(2),
    # var_baseline_rings_comb["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # var_t0_rings_comb["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # cor_baseline_t0_summary_["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # resid_var["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  row = c(3,4,7,8)
) %>%
  mutate(median_CI = paste0(mean, " [", ci_lower, ", ", ci_upper, "]"))

sex_age_avg_mod_summary_table %>% select(-c(mean, ci_lower, ci_upper))
# ================================
# 9. Posterior distributions of fixed effects
# ================================
posterior_fixed <- sex_age_avg_mod$fitted_model %>%
  spread_draws(
    b_baseline_Intercept,
    b_baseline_sexM,
    b_baseline_age_dev,
    b_baseline_avg_age,
    b_t0_Intercept,
    b_t0_sexM,
    b_t0_age_dev,
    b_t0_avg_age,
    b_k_Intercept
  )

posterior_long <- posterior_fixed %>%
  select(-c(.chain, .iteration, .draw)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "term", values_to = "estimate")

ggplot(posterior_long, aes(x = estimate, y = term)) +
  stat_halfeye(.width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),
               fill = "skyblue",
               color = "darkblue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior distributions of fixed effects",
    x = "Estimate",
    y = "Parameter"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# # ================================
# # 10. Access key derived quantities
# # ================================
# post$baseline_sexF
# post$baseline_sexM
# post$t0
# post$rate_days_score_sexF
# post$rate_days_score_sexM

# ================================
# 12. Posterior predictive checks
# ================================
# Plot observed vs simulated data
pp_check(sex_age_avg_mod$fitted_model, ndraws = 100)

# ================================
# 13. R-hat checks for convergence
# ================================
rhat_values <- posterior::rhat(sex_age_avg_mod$fitted_model)
summary(rhat_values)  # All should be ~1 for good convergence
```

#### sex- and migratory-status model
```{r}
# ================================
# 2. Extract posterior draws
# ================================
post <- as_draws_df(sex_migratory_status_mod$fitted_model)

# ----------------
# Standardized sex effect on baseline
resid_sd <- sd(sex_migratory_status_mod$data$score, na.rm = TRUE)
sex_baseline_std <- post$b_baseline_sexM / resid_sd
sex_t0_std <- post$b_t0_sexM / resid_sd

# ================================
# 3. Back-transform t0 and baseline
# ================================
date_scaling <- sex_migratory_status_mod$data %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_J = mean(date_J),
      sd_J   = sd(date_J),
      n      = dplyr::n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

# Weighted mean SD across seasons (recommended)
mean_date_sd   <- with(date_scaling, weighted.mean(sd_J, w = n))
mean_date_mean <- with(date_scaling, weighted.mean(mean_J, w = n))

post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    # sex-specific baselines
    baseline_sexF = b_baseline_Intercept,
    baseline_sexM = b_baseline_Intercept + b_baseline_sexM,
    
    # migratory-status effect on baseline (controlling for sex)
    baseline_statusR = b_baseline_migratory_statusR,
    
    # sex-specific t0s
    t0_sexF_date = (b_t0_Intercept) * mean_date_sd + mean_date_mean,
    t0_sexM_date = (b_t0_Intercept + b_t0_sexM) * mean_date_sd + mean_date_mean,
    
    # migratory-status effect on t0 (controlling for sex)
    t0_statusR_days = b_t0_migratory_statusR * mean_date_sd
  )

# ================================
# 4. Posterior summary helper
# ================================
summarize_posterior <- function(x) {
  c(
    median   = median(x),
    ci_lower = quantile(x, 0.025),
    ci_upper = quantile(x, 0.975)
  )
}

# ----------------
# Summarize key fixed effects
std_sex_baseline_summary <- summarize_posterior(sex_baseline_std)
std_sex_t0_summary <- summarize_posterior(sex_t0_std)

# sex-specific t0s
t0_sexF_date_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexF_date)
t0_sexM_date_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexM_date)
t0_sexF_int_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexF_int)
t0_sexM_b_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_sexM_b)

# sex-specific baselines
baseline_sexF_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$baseline_sexF)
baseline_sexM_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$baseline_sexM)

# migratory-status effects
t0_statusR_days_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$t0_statusR_days)
baseline_statusR_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$baseline_statusR)

# # back-transformed t0 predictions (real dates)
# t0_sexF_summary_trans <- 
#   as.Date(t0_sexF_summary - 181 - 1, origin = paste0("2021", "-01-01")) %>% 
#   format(., "%b-%d")
# 
# t0_sexM_summary_trans <- 
#   as.Date(t0_sexM_summary - 181 - 1, origin = paste0("2021", "-01-01")) %>% 
#   format(., "%b-%d")

# ================================
# 5. Interpret k: peak rate of change in days·score⁻¹
# ================================
post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    # Peak rate in scores·day⁻¹
    rate_scores_day_sexF = ((baseline_sexF - 1) * b_k_Intercept) / (4 * mean_date_sd),
    rate_scores_day_sexM = ((baseline_sexM - 1) * b_k_Intercept) / (4 * mean_date_sd),
    # Convert to days·score⁻¹
    rate_days_score_sexF = 1 / rate_scores_day_sexF,
    rate_days_score_sexM = 1 / rate_scores_day_sexM
  )

rate_sexF_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$rate_days_score_sexF)
rate_sexM_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$rate_days_score_sexM)

# ================================
# 6. Bayesian R²
# ================================
r2_df <- r2_bayes(sex_migratory_status_mod$fitted_model) %>% as.data.frame()

r2_summary <- tibble(
  type     = c("Marginal R²", "Conditional R²"),
  mean     = c(r2_df$R2[2], r2_df$R2[1]),
  ci_lower = c(r2_df$CI_low[2], r2_df$CI_low[1]),
  ci_upper = c(r2_df$CI_high[2], r2_df$CI_high[1])
)

# ================================
# 7. Variance components & repeatabilities
# ================================
post <- post %>%
  mutate(
    var_baseline_indiv =
      sd_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept^2 +
      `sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2,
    var_t0_indiv =
      sd_rings_comb__t0_Intercept^2 +
      `sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2,
    R_baseline = var_baseline_indiv / (var_baseline_indiv + sigma^2),
    R_t0       = var_t0_indiv / (var_t0_indiv + sigma^2),
    R_baseline_within_season =
      `sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2 /
      (`sd_rings_comb:season__baseline_Intercept`^2 + sigma^2),
    R_t0_within_season =
      `sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2 /
      (`sd_rings_comb:season__t0_Intercept`^2 + sigma^2)
  )

R_baseline_summary               <- summarize_posterior(post$R_baseline)
R_t0_summary                     <- summarize_posterior(post$R_t0)
R_baseline_within_season_summary <- summarize_posterior(post$R_baseline_within_season)
R_t0_within_season_summary       <- summarize_posterior(post$R_t0_within_season)

# ================================
# 8. Variance component table
# ================================
var_baseline_rings_comb <- summarize_posterior(
  post$sd_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept^2
)

var_t0_rings_comb <- summarize_posterior(
  post$sd_rings_comb__t0_Intercept^2
)

resid_var <- summarize_posterior(post$sigma^2)

# ================================
# 11. Posterior correlation between baseline and t0
# ================================
cor_baseline_t0_summary_ <- summarize_posterior(post$cor_rings_comb__baseline_Intercept__t0_Intercept)

### summary table 
sex_migratory_status_mod_summary_table <- tibble(
  parameter = c(
    # "Female median alternate plumage (beta)",
    # "Male median alternate plumage (beta)",
    "Migratory-strategy effect on baseline alternate plumage score (β): Resident − Migrant",
    # "Female pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    # "Male pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    "Migratory-strategy effect on pre-basic moult midpoint (t0): Resident − Migrant"
    # "Female moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "Male moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "Between year alternate plumage",
    # "Within year alternate plumage",
    # "Between year moult mid-point date",
    # "Within year moult mid-point date",
    # "Marginal R²",
    # "Conditional R²",
    # "Random effect variance (baseline)",
    # "Random effect variance (t0)",
    # "Correlation between beta and t0",
    # "Residual variance"
  ),
  type = c(
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)"
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Posterior estimates (state-specific means)",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Repeatability",
    # "Model-level goodness-of-fit",
    # "Model-level goodness-of-fit",
    # "Between-individual variance (random effects)",
    # "Between-individual variance (random effects)",
    # "Random-effects correlation",
    # "Residual (within-observation) variance"
  ),
  parameter_ = c(
    # "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    # "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    "Full alternate plumage score (beta)",
    # "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    # "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)",
    "Pre-basic moult mid-point date (t0)"
    # "Moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "Moult rate (days·score⁻¹, k)",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # "",
    # ""
  ),
  mean = c(
    # baseline_sexF_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # baseline_sexM_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_statusR_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["median"],
    # t0_sexM_b_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    t0_statusR_days_summary["median"] %>% round(2)
    # rate_sexF_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # rate_sexM_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_within_season_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_within_season_summary["median"] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$mean[1] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$mean[2] %>% round(2),
    # var_baseline_rings_comb["median"] %>% round(2),
    # var_t0_rings_comb["median"] %>% round(2),
    # cor_baseline_t0_summary_["median"] %>% round(2),
    # resid_var["median"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  ci_lower = c(
    # baseline_sexF_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # baseline_sexM_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_statusR_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["ci_upper.2.5%"],
    # t0_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    t0_statusR_days_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2)
    # rate_sexF_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # rate_sexM_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_within_season_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_within_season_summary["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_lower[1] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_lower[2] %>% round(2),
    # var_baseline_rings_comb["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # var_t0_rings_comb["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # cor_baseline_t0_summary_["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # resid_var["ci_lower.2.5%"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  ci_upper = c(
    # baseline_sexF_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # baseline_sexM_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    baseline_statusR_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # t0_sexF_int_summary_trans["ci_upper.97.5%"],
    # t0_sexM_b_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    t0_statusR_days_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2)
    # rate_sexF_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # rate_sexM_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_baseline_within_season_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # R_t0_within_season_summary["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_upper[1] %>% round(2),
    # r2_summary$ci_upper[2] %>% round(2),
    # var_baseline_rings_comb["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # var_t0_rings_comb["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # cor_baseline_t0_summary_["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2),
    # resid_var["ci_upper.97.5%"] %>% round(2)
  ),
  row = c(3,6)
) %>%
  mutate(median_CI = paste0(mean, " [", ci_lower, ", ", ci_upper, "]"))

sex_migratory_status_mod_summary_table
# ================================
# 9. Posterior distributions of fixed effects
# ================================
posterior_fixed <- sex_migratory_status_mod$fitted_model %>%
  spread_draws(
    b_baseline_Intercept,
    b_baseline_sexM,
    b_baseline_migratory_statusR,
    b_t0_Intercept,
    b_t0_sexM,
    b_t0_migratory_statusR,
    b_k_Intercept
  )

posterior_long <- posterior_fixed %>%
  select(-c(.chain, .iteration, .draw)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "term", values_to = "estimate")

ggplot(posterior_long, aes(x = estimate, y = term)) +
  stat_halfeye(.width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),
               fill = "skyblue",
               color = "darkblue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior distributions of fixed effects",
    x = "Estimate",
    y = "Parameter"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# # ================================
# # 10. Access key derived quantities
# # ================================
# post$baseline_sexF
# post$baseline_sexM
# post$t0
# post$rate_days_score_sexF
# post$rate_days_score_sexM

# ================================
# 12. Posterior predictive checks
# ================================
# Plot observed vs simulated data
pp_check(sex_migratory_status_mod$fitted_model, ndraws = 100)

# ================================
# 13. R-hat checks for convergence
# ================================
rhat_values <- posterior::rhat(sex_migratory_status_mod$fitted_model)
summary(rhat_values)  # All should be ~1 for good convergence
```

#### consolidated table
```{r}
# footnote: Fixed effects are reported as posterior medians with 95% credible intervals. Intercepts represent reference categories (female, first-year, migrant, mean age). Sex, age-class, and migratory-strategy terms represent additive contrasts. Age was decomposed into within- and between-individual components. Moult rate is a derived posterior quantity evaluated at the inflection point.
grand_summary_table <-
  bind_rows(sex_mod_summary_table[which(sex_mod_summary_table$row %in% c(1, 2)), 
                                  c("type", "parameter_", "parameter", "median_CI")],
            sex_age_class_mod_summary_table[which(sex_age_class_mod_summary_table$row %in% c(3)), 
                                            c("type", "parameter_", "parameter", "median_CI")],
            sex_age_avg_mod_summary_table[which(sex_age_avg_mod_summary_table$row %in% c(3, 4)), 
                                          c("type", "parameter_", "parameter", "median_CI")],
            sex_migratory_status_mod_summary_table[which(sex_migratory_status_mod_summary_table$row %in% c(3)), 
                                                   c("type", "parameter_", "parameter", "median_CI")],
            sex_mod_summary_table[which(sex_mod_summary_table$row %in% c(3, 4)), 
                                  c("type", "parameter_", "parameter", "median_CI")],
            sex_age_class_mod_summary_table[which(sex_age_class_mod_summary_table$row %in% c(6)), 
                                            c("type", "parameter_", "parameter", "median_CI")],
            sex_age_avg_mod_summary_table[which(sex_age_avg_mod_summary_table$row %in% c(7, 8)), 
                                          c("type", "parameter_", "parameter", "median_CI")],
            sex_migratory_status_mod_summary_table[which(sex_migratory_status_mod_summary_table$row %in% c(6)), 
                                                   c("type", "parameter_", "parameter", "median_CI")],
            sex_all_3_summary_table[which(sex_all_3_summary_table$row %in% c(5:7)), 
                                    c("type", "parameter_", "parameter", "median_CI")],
            sex_mod_summary_table[which(sex_mod_summary_table$row %in% c(5:16)), 
                                  c("type", "parameter_", "parameter", "median_CI")])


grand_summary_table %>% 
  select(parameter, median_CI) %>%
  print(n = 30)
```


```{r, eval=FALSE}
grand_summary_table_export <- grand_summary_table %>%
  dplyr::select(
    type,
    parameter_,
    parameter,
    median_CI
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Category = type,
    Group = parameter_,
    Parameter = parameter,
    Estimate_95CI = median_CI
  )
# install.packages("writexl")
library(writexl)
write_xlsx(
  grand_summary_table,
  "out/Jan_2026/grand_summary_table_final.xlsx"
)
```

### Auxiliary analyses
#### Do migratory strategies differ in breeding phenology?
```{r}
dat_migratory_status_breed <- dat_breeding %>%
  # remove outlier data
  filter(date_J < 300) %>%
  # subset to columns of interest
  select(score, date_J, rings_comb_simp, 
         sex, season, migratory_status, 
         last_breeding_date_J_snum, 
         first_breeding_date_J_snum,
         last_nest_first_obs_J_snum) %>%
  rename(rings_comb = rings_comb_simp) %>% 
  # reduce to distinct data
  distinct() %>% 
  # classify score and sex
  mutate(
    score = as.numeric(score),
    sex = as.factor(sex),
    season = factor(season, levels = c("2021", "2022", "2023")),
    rings_comb = as.factor(rings_comb),
    migratory_status = factor(migratory_status, levels = c("M", "R"))
  ) %>%
  # scale the date_J variable
  group_by(season) %>% 
  mutate(date_J_scaled = as.vector(scale(date_J))) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  # drop NAs
  drop_na(score, date_J_scaled, rings_comb, 
         sex, season, migratory_status, 
         last_breeding_date_J_snum, 
         first_breeding_date_J_snum,
         last_nest_first_obs_J_snum) %>% 
  # convert to dataframe
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  distinct(rings_comb, migratory_status, 
           last_nest_first_obs_J_snum, 
           first_breeding_date_J_snum, 
           last_breeding_date_J_snum)

mod_mig_lay <- lmer(
  last_nest_first_obs_J_snum ~ migratory_status + (1 | rings_comb),
  data = dat_migratory_status_breed
)
summary(mod_mig_lay)

mod_mig_first <- lmer(
  first_breeding_date_J_snum ~ migratory_status + (1 | rings_comb),
  data = dat_migratory_status_breed
)
summary(mod_mig_first)

mod_mig_last <- lmer(
  last_breeding_date_J_snum ~ migratory_status + (1 | rings_comb),
  data = dat_migratory_status_breed
)
summary(mod_mig_last)

# (Optional but recommended) ensure factor coding matches lmer output
# If lmer showed "migratory_statusR", then the reference level is the other level (likely "M" or similar).
# Explicitly set it so results are reproducible:
# dat_migratory_status_breed$migratory_status <- relevel(dat_migratory_status_breed$migratory_status, ref = "M")

# Weakly-informative priors suitable for season-standardized outcomes
priors_gauss <- c(
  prior(normal(0, 2), class = "b"),          # fixed effects (incl. migratory_status)
  prior(normal(0, 5), class = "Intercept"),  # intercept
  prior(exponential(1), class = "sd"),       # random effect SDs
  prior(exponential(1), class = "sigma")     # residual SD
)

# 1) last_nest_first_obs_J_snum ~ migratory_status + (1 | rings_comb)
mod_mig_lay_brms <- brm(
  last_nest_first_obs_J_snum ~ migratory_status + (1 | rings_comb),
  data   = dat_migratory_status_breed,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior  = priors_gauss,
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 4000, warmup = 1000,
  seed   = 123
)

# 2) first_breeding_date_J_snum ~ migratory_status + (1 | rings_comb)
mod_mig_first_brms <- brm(
  first_breeding_date_J_snum ~ migratory_status + (1 | rings_comb),
  data   = dat_migratory_status_breed,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior  = priors_gauss,
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 4000, warmup = 1000,
  seed   = 123
)

# 3) last_breeding_date_J_snum ~ migratory_status + (1 | rings_comb)
mod_mig_last_brms <- brm(
  last_breeding_date_J_snum ~ migratory_status + (1 | rings_comb),
  data   = dat_migratory_status_breed,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior  = priors_gauss,
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 4000, warmup = 1000,
  seed   = 123
)

# Summaries (posterior medians/means + CrIs)
summary(mod_mig_lay_brms)
summary(mod_mig_first_brms)
summary(mod_mig_last_brms)

# Fixed effects with 95% CrI
fixef(mod_mig_first_brms, probs = c(0.025, 0.5, 0.975)) %>% round(2)
fixef(mod_mig_last_brms, probs = c(0.025, 0.5, 0.975)) %>% round(2)
fixef(mod_mig_lay_brms, probs = c(0.025, 0.5, 0.975)) %>% round(2)

# Random-effect SDs and correlations
VarCorr(mod_mig_first_brms)
VarCorr(mod_mig_last_brms)
VarCorr(mod_mig_lay_brms)
```

#### Is age associated with breeding phenology?
```{r}
avg_ages <- 
  dat_breeding %>%
  mutate(rings_comb = rings_comb_simp) %>% 
  distinct(rings_comb, age) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(age)) %>% 
  group_by(rings_comb) %>% 
  summarise(avg_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE))

avg_ages2 <- 
  dat_breeding %>%
  mutate(rings_comb = rings_comb_simp) %>% 
  distinct(rings_comb, age) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(age)) %>% 
  filter(age > 1) %>% 
  group_by(rings_comb) %>% 
  summarise(avg_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE))

# Clean data
dat_age_breed <- dat_breeding %>%
  # remove outlier data
  filter(date_J < 300) %>%
  # subset to columns of interest
  select(score, date_J, rings_comb_simp, sex, season, age, 
         last_breeding_date_J_snum, 
         first_breeding_date_J_snum,
         last_nest_first_obs_J_snum, 
         last_breeding_date_J_s1num, 
         first_breeding_date_J_s1num,
         last_nest_first_obs_J_s1num) %>%
  rename(rings_comb = rings_comb_simp) %>% 
  # reduce to distinct data
  distinct() %>% 
  # classify score and sex
  mutate(
    score = as.numeric(score),
    sex = as.factor(sex),
    season = factor(season, levels = c("2021", "2022", "2023")),
    rings_comb = as.factor(rings_comb)
  ) %>%
  # scale the date_J variable
  group_by(season) %>% 
  mutate(date_J_scaled = as.vector(scale(date_J))) %>%
  # center age
  filter(!is.na(age)) %>% 
  left_join(., avg_ages, by = "rings_comb") %>% 
  # group_by(rings_comb) %>% 
  # mutate(#first_age = min(age, na.rm = TRUE),
  #        #last_age = max(age, na.rm = TRUE),
  #        avg_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(age_dev = age - avg_age) %>% 
  # mutate(age_centered = age - mean(age, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  # drop NAs
  drop_na(score, date_J, sex, rings_comb, 
          season, avg_age, age_dev, 
         last_breeding_date_J_snum, 
         first_breeding_date_J_snum,
         last_nest_first_obs_J_snum, 
         last_breeding_date_J_s1num, 
         first_breeding_date_J_s1num,
         last_nest_first_obs_J_s1num) %>% 
  # convert to dataframe
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  select(rings_comb, avg_age, sex, age_dev, 
           last_breeding_date_J_snum, 
           first_breeding_date_J_snum,
           last_nest_first_obs_J_snum, 
           last_breeding_date_J_s1num, 
           first_breeding_date_J_s1num,
           last_nest_first_obs_J_s1num) %>% 
  distinct()

dat_age2_breed <- dat_breeding %>%
  # remove outlier data
  filter(date_J < 300) %>% 
  # subset to columns of interest
  select(score, date_J, rings_comb_simp, sex, season, age, 
         last_breeding_date_J_snum, 
         first_breeding_date_J_snum,
         last_nest_first_obs_J_snum, 
         last_breeding_date_J_s1num, 
         first_breeding_date_J_s1num,
         last_nest_first_obs_J_s1num) %>%
  rename(rings_comb = rings_comb_simp) %>% 
  # reduce to distinct data
  distinct() %>% 
  # classify score and sex
  mutate(
    score = as.numeric(score),
    sex = as.factor(sex),
    season = factor(season, levels = c("2021", "2022", "2023")),
    rings_comb = as.factor(rings_comb)
  ) %>%
  # scale the date_J variable
  group_by(season) %>% 
  mutate(date_J_scaled = as.vector(scale(date_J))) %>%
  # center age
  filter(!is.na(age)) %>%
  filter(age > 1) %>% 
  left_join(., avg_ages2, by = "rings_comb") %>% 
  # group_by(rings_comb) %>% 
  # mutate(#first_age = min(age, na.rm = TRUE),
  #        #last_age = max(age, na.rm = TRUE),
  #        avg_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(age_dev = age - avg_age) %>% 
  # mutate(age_centered = age - mean(age, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  # drop NAs
  drop_na(score, date_J, sex, rings_comb, 
          season, avg_age, age_dev, 
         last_breeding_date_J_snum, 
         first_breeding_date_J_snum,
         last_nest_first_obs_J_snum, 
         last_breeding_date_J_s1num, 
         first_breeding_date_J_s1num,
         last_nest_first_obs_J_s1num) %>% 
  # convert to dataframe
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  select(rings_comb, sex, avg_age, age_dev, 
           last_breeding_date_J_snum, 
           first_breeding_date_J_snum,
           last_nest_first_obs_J_snum, 
           last_breeding_date_J_s1num, 
           first_breeding_date_J_s1num,
           last_nest_first_obs_J_s1num) %>% 
  distinct()

mod_age_lay <- lmer(
  last_nest_first_obs_J_snum ~ age_dev + avg_age + (1 | rings_comb),
  data = dat_age_breed
)

mod_age_first <- lmer(
  first_breeding_date_J_snum ~ age_dev + avg_age + (1 | rings_comb),
  data = dat_age_breed
)

mod_age_last <- lmer(
  last_breeding_date_J_snum ~ age_dev + avg_age + (1 | rings_comb),
  data = dat_age_breed
)

mod_age2_lay <- lmer(
  last_nest_first_obs_J_snum ~ age_dev + avg_age + (1 | rings_comb),
  data = dat_age2_breed
)

mod_age2_first <- lmer(
  first_breeding_date_J_snum ~ age_dev + avg_age + (1 | rings_comb),
  data = dat_age2_breed
)

mod_age2_last <- lmer(
  last_breeding_date_J_snum ~ age_dev + avg_age + (1 | rings_comb),
  data = dat_age2_breed
)


# Weakly-informative priors suitable for season-standardized outcomes
priors_gauss <- c(
  prior(normal(0, 2), class = "b"),          # fixed effects (incl. migratory_status)
  prior(normal(0, 5), class = "Intercept"),  # intercept
  prior(exponential(1), class = "sd"),       # random effect SDs
  prior(exponential(1), class = "sigma")     # residual SD
)

# 1) last_nest_first_obs_J_snum 
mod_age_lay_brms <- brm(
  last_nest_first_obs_J_snum ~ age_dev + avg_age + (1 | rings_comb),
  data   = dat_age_breed,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior  = priors_gauss,
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 4000, warmup = 1000,
  seed   = 123,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12)
)

# 2) first_breeding_date_J_snum 
mod_age_first_brms <- brm(
  first_breeding_date_J_snum ~ age_dev + avg_age + (1 | rings_comb),
  data   = dat_age_breed,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior  = priors_gauss,
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 4000, warmup = 1000,
  seed   = 123,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12)
)

# 3) last_breeding_date_J_snum
mod_age_last_brms <- brm(
  last_breeding_date_J_snum ~ age_dev + avg_age + (1 | rings_comb),
  data   = dat_age_breed,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior  = priors_gauss,
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 4000, warmup = 1000,
  seed   = 123,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12)
)

# 1) last_nest_first_obs_J_snum 
mod_age2_lay_brms <- brm(
  last_nest_first_obs_J_snum ~ age_dev + avg_age + (1 | rings_comb),
  data   = dat_age2_breed,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior  = priors_gauss,
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 4000, warmup = 1000,
  seed   = 123
)

# 2) first_breeding_date_J_snum 
mod_age2_first_brms <- brm(
  first_breeding_date_J_snum ~ age_dev + avg_age + (1 | rings_comb),
  data   = dat_age2_breed,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior  = priors_gauss,
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 4000, warmup = 1000,
  seed   = 123
)

# 3) last_breeding_date_J_snum
mod_age2_last_brms <- brm(
  last_breeding_date_J_snum ~ age_dev + avg_age + (1 | rings_comb),
  data   = dat_age2_breed,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior  = priors_gauss,
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 4000, warmup = 1000,
  seed   = 123
)

fit_age_sex_int <- function(response, data, priors = priors_gauss, seed = 123) {

  fml <- bf(as.formula(
    paste0(response, " ~ 1 + sex + age_dev + avg_age + sex:age_dev + sex:avg_age + (1 | rings_comb)")
  ))

  brm(
    formula = fml,
    data    = data,
    family  = gaussian(),
    prior   = priors,
    chains  = 4, cores = 4, iter = 4000, warmup = 1000,
    seed    = seed,
    control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12)
  )
}
mod_int_first <- fit_age_sex_int("first_breeding_date_J_snum", dat_age_breed)
mod_int_last  <- fit_age_sex_int("last_breeding_date_J_snum",  dat_age_breed)
mod_int_lay   <- fit_age_sex_int("last_nest_first_obs_J_snum",  dat_age_breed)

# frequentist lmer output
summary(mod_age2_last)
```
